summary.key_theme: 市場對 Bloom Energy 的關稅重置敘事持正面預期，推動股價在盤前交易走高。

bullish.title: What's Going On With Bloom Energy Stock Monday? — Bloom Energy Corp (NYSE: BE) shares are trading higher in Monday's premarket as traders lean into tariff-reset narra
bullish.reason: 市場交易員對 Bloom Energy 的「關稅重置」敘事反應積極，預期政策調整將有利於公司業務，導致股價在盤前交易呈現上漲趨勢。
